title: A rainbow over City Hall: Syracuse honors Pride Month with flag raising
summary: Syracuse held its annual Pride Month flag raising ceremony at City Hall on May 31, 2025, with Mayor Ben Walsh and CNY Pride leadership affirming the city's commitment to LGBTQ+ inclusion and equality. The Pride flag will remain flying throughout June as a visible symbol of the city's values around diversity, unity, and resilience.

political_signal.description: City leadership explicitly signaling commitment to LGBTQ+ community inclusion and protection as a municipal priority during Pride Month observance.

processing_notes: Article is primarily ceremonial/symbolic in nature rather than policy or operational change
